queries.question: List all of the certifications and the number of jobs available for each certification.
queries.sql: select cert_name, count(*) from Certification join Job_Post on Job_Post.Certification_id = Certification.id group by cert_name
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?cert_name_g (COUNT(*) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?certification a :Certification .
  ?job_post a :JobPostings .
  ?job_post p:hasCertification ?certification .
  ?certification p:cert_name ?cert_name_g .
}
GROUP BY ?cert_name_g

queries.question: Display a list of qualifications and the number of available jobs for each
queries.sql: select level_name, count(*) from Degree_Level join Job_Post on Job_Post.degree_level_id = Degree_Level.id group by level_name
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?level_name_g (COUNT(*) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?degree_level a :Degree_Level .
  ?job_post a :JobPostings .
  ?job_post p:hasDegree_Level ?degree_level .
  ?degree_level p:level_name ?level_name_g .
}
GROUP BY ?level_name_g

queries.question: Display a list of qualifications and the number of available jobs for each
queries.sql: select level_name, cert_name, count(*) from Degree_Level join Job_Post on Job_Post.degree_level_id = Degree_Level.id join Certification on Job_Post.Certification_id = Certification.id group by level_name, cert_name
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?level_name_g ?cert_name_g (COUNT(*) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?degree_level a :Degree_Level .
  ?job_post a :JobPostings .
  ?job_post p:hasDegree_Level ?degree_level .
  ?certification a :Certification .
  ?job_post p:hasCertification ?certification .
  ?degree_level p:level_name ?level_name_g .
  ?certification p:cert_name ?cert_name_g .
}
GROUP BY ?level_name_g ?cert_name_g

queries.question: Which posted jobs require which qualifications?
queries.sql: select title, level_name from Job_Post join Degree_Level on Job_Post.degree_level_id = Degree_Level.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?level_name WHERE {
  ?job_post a :JobPostings .
  ?degree_level a :Degree_Level .
  ?job_post p:hasDegree_Level ?degree_level .
  ?job_post p:title ?title .
  ?degree_level p:level_name ?level_name .
}

queries.question: Which posted jobs require which qualifications?
queries.sql: select title, level_name, cert_name from Job_Post join Degree_Level on Job_Post.degree_level_id = Degree_Level.id join Certification on Job_Post.Certification_id = Certification.id

  ?certification a :Certification .
